title: Internals: Implement tagged unions per IEEE 1800-2023 §7.3.2 (#6867 partial)

features.name: tagged union type declaration with void and typed members
features.description: Code should include a tagged union type declaration using the tagged qualifier with both void and typed members
features.snippet: typedef union tagged { void Invalid; int Valid; } VInt;

features.name: tagged expression with typed member and value
features.description: Code should include a tagged expression assigning a typed member with an expression value to a tagged union variable

features.name: tagged expression with void member
features.description: Code should include a tagged expression assigning a void member to a tagged union variable

features.name: case expression with matches and tagged pattern
features.description: Code should include a case expression using the matches keyword with tagged patterns for pattern matching on tagged unions

features.name: if expression with matches and pattern variable
features.description: Code should include an if expression using matches with a tagged pattern and pattern variable binding

features.name: unpacked tagged union in procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include a tagged union with dynamic types (real, string, class, chandle) used in procedural assignment context
features.snippet:
typedef union tagged { void Invalid; real Valid; } VReal;
VReal r = tagged Valid (3.14);
